name: Create Math Jeopardy Review Game
description: Create a 4-page interactive Jeopardy-style review game for a 6th grade math unit on Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages. Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/math_review_jeopardy.flipchart. The flipchart must include a title page with the title 'Math Review Jeopardy' and a subtitle listing the categories 'Fractions', 'Decimals', and 'Percentages'. Construct a game board page featuring a 3x3 grid of nine colored rectangles organized into three columns labeled with the categories and rows labeled with point values '100', '200', and '300'. Additionally, include a 'Fractions' question page with the text 'What is 3/4 + 1/2?' and an 'Answer' page displaying the correct result '1 1/4' or '5/4'.
